overall.description: A nighttime urban scene from a video game (GTA V style) depicting a character walking along a wet city sidewalk toward an intersection. A pedestrian crosses the street as traffic signals change from red to green, with streetlights reflecting off the damp pavement and commercial buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching intersection with crosswalk

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: walking across the crosswalk from the far side toward the camera

entered.detail: yellow diamond-shaped warning sign with black pedestrian symbol
tall metal pole with traffic signal showing red light
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
perforated metal garbage bin next to the hydrant
tall metal fence running parallel to the street
orange and white striped plastic barriers
blue two-door vehicle waiting at the red traffic light

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a wet city sidewalk at night, approaching an intersection. A yellow pedestrian crossing sign and fire hydrant mark the corner ahead, while a chain-link fence lines the right side. Across the street, an NPC walks toward the crosswalk as the traffic light glows red, and a blue sports car waits at the intersection.

events.description: pedestrian passes by the camera on the right and exits frame

agents.ego_description: continuing past the intersection as the pedestrian passes by

entered.detail: illuminated storefronts and building facades across the intersection
paved crosswalk and road markings at the intersection

segments.scene_description: As the traffic light turns green, the NPC pedestrian passes by on the right and exits the frame. The camera continues walking past the intersection, with the traffic light pole and street furniture receding behind. Commercial buildings with illuminated signs become visible across the street as the camera approaches the crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a damp urban sidewalk at night, transitioning from a quiet street corner to a bustling commercial intersection. It begins by gliding past a chain-link fence toward a yellow pedestrian sign and a fire hydrant, while a blue sports car waits under a red traffic light. As the light turns green, a pedestrian crosses the street and exits the frame, allowing the camera to push forward past the intersection. The scene then opens up as the traffic pole recedes, revealing illuminated commercial signs and storefronts across the street. The movement finally carries the camera directly toward the crosswalk, with the city lights reflecting vividly off the wet pavement.
